metadata._description: Generic per-table Data Collection Rule for the Sentinel Data Connector and Agent Builder ingestion pipeline. One deployment per custom *_CL table. Uses the Logs Ingestion API model: streamDeclarations[<streamName>] -> Log Analytics workspace via a Data Collection Endpoint. The orchestrator (scripts/Invoke-SampleDataIngestion.ps1) reads schemas/<table>.json and invokes this template once per table.
metadata._phase: Phase 3 — DCE/DCR + Logs Ingestion API redesign
metadata._compatibility: az CLI deployment group / management group / subscription scope (this file: resourceGroup scope). ARM language built-ins only — no Bicep, no languageVersion 2.0 — for max compatibility with az deployment group create.

metadata.description: DCR resource name. Convention: dcr-<tableNameLower> (e.g. dcr-lightningtier0nodes-cl).
Azure region. Must match the workspace and DCE region.
Full resourceId of the destination Log Analytics workspace.
Full resourceId of the Data Collection Endpoint that fronts the Logs Ingestion API.

Inbound DCR stream name (the one the orchestrator POSTs to via Logs Ingestion API). Always Custom-<TableName>, even when the destination is a native table — Azure requires inbound streams declared on a customer DCR to use the 'Custom-' prefix.

Destination outputStream. For custom *_CL tables, leave empty (defaults to streamName, which routes to the matching Custom-<Table>_CL). For LIA-supported native tables (CommonSecurityLog, Syslog, SecurityEvent, etc.) set to 'Microsoft-<NativeTableName>' so the DCR routes the inbound stream into the platform-owned native table instead of creating a Custom-<Table>_CL destination. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/azure-monitor/logs/logs-ingestion-api-overview#supported-tables for the supported list.
Array of {name, type} objects. type must be one of: string, datetime, int, long, real, bool, dynamic. Read from schemas/<TableName>.json.
Resource tags applied to the DCR.
